translations.llmcfg.title: AI Model / LLM
translations.llmcfg.hint: Admin sets whether the engine uses an API (OpenAI/Claude) or Local (Ollama) — the "Active" one is what actually runs.
translations.llmcfg.empty: None yet — add the first connection
translations.llmcfg.name: Name
translations.llmcfg.endpointCustomHint: The API ROOT, e.g. http://localhost:1234/v1 — the server appends /chat/completions
translations.llmcfg.apiKeyKeep: Leave blank to keep current key
translations.llmcfg.apiKeyOptional: Optional — most local servers ignore it
translations.llmcfg.roles.title: Assign to systems
translations.llmcfg.roles.hint: Pick which connection each system uses — leave on default to use the Active one.
translations.llmcfg.role.engine.desc: The main agent that replies and drives tools
translations.llmcfg.role.answer.desc: Synthesize an answer from the codex with source citations
translations.llmcfg.roles.notInstalled: Module not installed — install it before assigning
translations.route.llm-config.title: AI Settings
translations.llmcfg.test.cat.not_found: Endpoint or model not found — check the Base URL
translations.llmcfg.test.cat.timeout: The endpoint did not respond in time
translations.llmcfg.test.cat.connection: Could not connect to the endpoint
translations.llmcfg.test.cat.blocked: Blocked — the address is not allowed
